arts.ttl: Where are they now: Manuel Pellegrini’s first Real Madrid XI
arts.sum: The Real Madrid XI for that 3-2 win was: Iker Casillas, Alvaro Arbeloa, Raul Albiol, Ezequiel Garay, Marcelo, Xabi Alonso, Lassana Diarra, Kaka, Raul, Cristiano Ronaldo, and Karim Benzema. Ezequiel Garay : Retired from professional football in 2021 after a career that included stints at Benfica, Zenit Saint Petersburg, and Valencia.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fined by UEFA and threatened with future stadium ban following homophobic chants aimed at Man City boss Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: In addition to the club's fine, Madrid have been warned by European football's governing body that further bad behaviour could result in a partial stadium ban.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid hit with fine and stadium closure threat by UEFA

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Who Replaces Ceballos Now? Is Modric Top-10 All Time?
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid are hopeful of closing a deal for a member of the defensive ranks at Premier League giants Arsenal in a year’s time. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: I was dumped by a Celtic legend after 'nightclub sex' - but Jose Mourinho robbed me of Real Madrid greatness
arts.sum: The former Stoke teammate of Charlie Adam was given his debut by Jose Mourinho

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fined for homophobic Guardiola chants
arts.sum: Real Madrid are fined by Uefa after some of their fans directed homophobic chants towards Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola in their Champions League second-leg tie at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo branded 'embarrassing' in comparison with Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has come under fire for his petulant behaviour following Al Nassr team-mate Jhon Duran's sending off as he kicked a ball into the stands and reprimanded the referee, but was spared any punishment

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star’s international return confirmed
arts.sum: Belgium head coach Rudi Garcia has on Friday confirmed the imminent return of Real Madrid star Thibaut Courtois to the country’s national setup. Goalkeeper Courtois, for his part, has not…
